heroHeadline: Three Days to Pahalgam Anniversary: Backchannel Talks Disclosed, Capitol Hill Exhibition Planned
heroSubtitle: India reveals four secret post-Sindoor meetings with Pakistan via IISS-facilitated Track 1.5 and Track 2 diplomacy despite frozen official ties; Indian Embassy in Washington plans 'Human Cost of Terrorism' Capitol Hill exhibition for April 22 anniversary; tourists return to Kashmir's Pahalgam as Baisaran meadow stays sealed and security grips tighten across J&K
footerNote: Data sourced from Indian MEA/MOD, Pakistan ISPR/MFA, UN Security Council, SIPRI, Crisis Group, HRW, Stimson Center
